stream_required: B.Tech-(All branches), BBA, MBA-All, BCA, MCA & Psychology.
date_of_joining: Jan’25 (Leaves will be provided for examination)

package_salary.ppo_ctc: Stipend during 6 months of Internship : INR 25,000/- per month Salary after 6 months of Internship (If PPO given) will be as under : For Any UG (3year course): CTC 5 LPA + Benefits ( INR 39,440/- pm, after deductions) For PG & B.Tech (4 year course): CTC 6 LPA + Benefits (INR 43,190/- pm, after deductions)
package_salary.bond: 2.5 years of Service and Level Agreement ( Will be signed once a candidate is converted into full time post successful completion of 6-months of internship).

selection_process_steps: will go through 100 hours of training through our certified trainers. (It
will happen at campus. Training cost will be bear by us only)
